channel.title: GitHub Elixir Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Elixir in GitHub

item.title: teslamate-org/teslamate
item.description: A self-hosted data logger for your Tesla 🚘

item.title: plausible/analytics
item.description: Simple, open source, lightweight (< 1 KB) and privacy-friendly web analytics alternative to Google Analytics.

item.title: phoenixframework/phoenix_live_view
item.description: Rich, real-time user experiences with server-rendered HTML

item.title: mirego/elixir-security-advisories
item.description: 🛡 Public database of Elixir security advisories pulled from GitHub Advisory Database

item.title: access-company/antikythera
item.description: Elixir framework to build your own in-house PaaS

item.title: helldivers-2/helldivers2-api
item.description: A community driven API for Helldivers 2

item.title: mtrudel/bandit
item.description: Bandit is a pure Elixir HTTP server for Plug & WebSock applications

item.title: firezone/firezone
item.description: WireGuard®-based zero trust access platform that supports OIDC authentication, user/group sync, and requires zero firewall configuration.

item.title: elixir-nx/bumblebee
item.description: Pre-trained Neural Network models in Axon (+ 🤗 Models integration)

item.title: ntrepid8/ex_crypto
item.description: Wrapper around the Erlang crypto module for Elixir.

item.title: leo-technologies-llc/fusion_auth
item.description: The fusion_auth library provides an Elixir API for accessing the FusionAuth Developer APIs.

item.title: phoenixframework/phoenix
item.description: Peace of mind from prototype to production

item.title: livebook-dev/livebook
item.description: Automate code & data workflows with interactive Elixir notebooks

item.title: elixir-ecto/ecto
item.description: A toolkit for data mapping and language integrated query.

item.title: blockscout/blockscout
item.description: Blockchain explorer for Ethereum based network and a tool for inspecting and analyzing EVM based blockchains.

item.title: WTTJ/chargebeex
item.description: An Elixir library to interact with Chargebee

item.title: Frameio/cereal_ex
item.description: A pluggable JSON serialization library for Elixir

item.title: pepsico-ecommerce/spandex_console
item.description: Console adapter/logger for Spandex traces & spans.

item.title: elixir-grpc/grpc
item.description: An Elixir implementation of gRPC

item.title: woutdp/live_svelte
item.description: Svelte inside Phoenix LiveView with seamless end-to-end reactivity

item.title: elixir-webrtc/ex_webrtc
item.description: An Elixir implementation of the W3C WebRTC API

item.title: elixir-lang/elixir
item.description: Elixir is a dynamic, functional language for building scalable and maintainable applications

item.title: rrrene/credo
item.description: A static code analysis tool for the Elixir language with a focus on code consistency and teaching.
